name: POST /api/properties - Admin creates a new property in DRAFT
description: Admin-only create endpoint. Persists a new property row in DRAFT (publish flips status via PATCH /:id/publish in Phase 1 Task #16). Validates with PropertyCreateRequestSchema; rejects duplicate slugs with 409 and inverted price ranges with 400.
skipReason: property-service runs on port 4012 (per .env MONOREPO PORT MAP); the projexlight test runner targets a single base URL (4010 = user-service). Re-enable once the API gateway/BFF lands or the runner gains per-route base-URL support.
